notes: Fixes The Tube TV Mode channel changes so channels tune into the shared live timeline instead of restarting videos.
Improves The Tube and VOD TV Mode scheduling to avoid immediate repeat episodes, movies, and commercials when alternatives are available.
Keeps scheduled TV Mode transitions black and quiet between videos/commercials instead of showing static or channel overlays.
Consumes exact duration metadata from Tater Tube Server when available for more accurate The Tube TV Mode schedules.
